questionHtml:
The micrograph shows tissues in a plant stem.

What is the reason that no nucleus is visible in Z?

A.  Xylem vessels are formed from dead lignified cells.

B.  Staining of cells destroys their nucleus.

C.  Phloem companion cells lack a nucleus.

D.  The nucleus is too small to be seen in a light microscope slide preparation.
